inputs.shares_source: 287,996 Class A shares outstanding at August 11, 2004 (HNFSA/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20040830_rpt20040531_acc000095011604002631.htm); aggregator ~1.21M for book math remains [Assumption]
inputs.book_per_share_source: [Assumption] OTC aggregator book value; last filed GAAP equity is FY2004 10-K Exhibit 13 — stale
inputs.debt_source: [Assumption] Aggregator balance sheet; not verified against filed statements
inputs.dividend_source: [Assumption] Aggregator forward dividend ~$1.10; last SEC dividend disclosure FY2004 era
inputs.financials_source: [Assumption] Aggregator trailing metrics; fiscal period not disclosed on OTC Pink — treat as illustrative only
inputs.plants_source: 10-K FY2004 Item 1: 11 PA, 1 MD, 1 DE, 1 NJ, 2 Guatemala
inputs.land_ppe_note: Land and buildings carried at historical cost in PP&E; FY2004 filing cites owned multi-state plant network — fair-value remark not in Lawrence base
inputs.normalization_note: No SEC or OTC Markets financial PDFs indexed as of 2026-06-10. Lawrence base uses book-discount re-rate path, not heroic operating growth.
inputs.last_sec_filing: 10-K FY2004 (period ended 2004-05-30); SC 13E3 odd-lot tender December 2004; no EDGAR filings after 2005-01-14

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: GAAP book per aggregator; PP&E at historical cost — economic floor requires plant/acreage remark [Assumption]
optionality_gate.notes: Price ~63% of GAAP book; partial dhando only until fresh filings or facility marks. Primary gate uses partial book re-rate, not operating compounder math.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy: Plants and land at historical cost; no fair-value NAV in last SEC filing (FY2004)
gaap_vs_fair_value.plants_disclosed: 15 processing plants (PA, MD, DE, NJ, Guatemala)

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Current PP&E and land breakout from management or OTC disclosure
Per-plant fair value or excess-acreage sale marks
Verified share count (Class A float vs treasury / ESOP)
Refreshed debt maturity schedule and covenant headroom

segments_or_options.label: Pennsylvania-centered processing plants and owned real estate
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: [Assumption] Partial uplift above GAAP cost for Hanover/Centre Hall footprint; no filed appraisal
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2004 Item 1 plant list; valuation.json land_ppe_note

segments_or_options.label: Warehime family control / odd-lot tender history
segments_or_options.evidence: SC 13E3 December 2004 odd-lot tender; Class B control structure in 10-K

bear.notes: Book erosion from commodity margin squeeze, debt refinanced at higher rates, no facility monetization

lines.label: Leverage and staleness haircut
lines.math: Debt ~$62M [Assumption]; embedded in $72 payoff not separate floor

lines.label: Plant / land remark (overlay only)
lines.math: [Assumption] nav_floor; not in Lawrence base payoff

sotp_build.notes: Base assumes price moves toward ~82% of stated book over seven years, not full fair-value mark

base.notes: Partial book catch-up + retained earnings; no facility sale in base

bull.notes: Strategic sale / re-mark of owned plants or family liquidity event re-rates equity near GAAP book

stance_proposal.override_reason: Mechanical hold on floor_pass and partial dhando; overridden to watch: last SEC filing FY2004, no indexed OTC financial PDFs, book/debt/price are aggregator [Assumption], family control limits catalyst visibility.

human_review.notes: Price, share count, book, debt, and operating metrics are aggregator-derived [Assumption] until verified. Appraisal-style $300+ BVPS claims are falsifier ceiling only. Flag for Vicki / human to obtain current shareholder report.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

catalyst_paths.impact: Partial book catch-up + retained earnings; no facility sale in base
Book erosion from commodity margin squeeze, debt refinanced at higher rates, no facility monetization

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete component schedule; preserve prior Lawrence/optionality stance gate unless human revises.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Starter retrofit schedule. Replace with a full segment inventory before IC sizing.

valuation.evidence: 287,996 Class A shares; December 2004 odd-lot tender at $131/sh; stated book ~$87.62/sh [Assumption]. Proof base 72.0236/sh via owner_cash_or_dividend_discount@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Provisional single-stack operating claim pending segment rebuild.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Operating cash collapses below the low case without offsetting asset value.

source.locator: 287,996 shares of Class A Common Stock outstanding as of August 11, 2004
Odd-lot tender offer price of $131.00 per share for eligible Class A shares

inputs.label: Stated GAAP book per Class A share (aggregator cross-check)

source.locator: Aggregator book value ~$87.62/sh; last filed GAAP equity is FY2004 Exhibit 13 — stale

assumptions.label: Seven-year owner-cash payoff as a fraction of stated book
assumptions.rationale: Bear assumes book erosion without facility monetization; base matches partial re-rate to $72/sh; bull approaches stated book if catalysts emerge.

valuation.evidence: 287,996 Class A shares; OTC Pink and Warehime Class B control from FY2004 10-K. Proof base -10.7773/sh via net_asset_value@1.0.
valuation.assumption_summary: Market-structure haircut separate from operating value.
valuation.cross_check: Range must reconcile to primary filings and realization path before IC approval.
valuation.falsifier: Liquidity event removes the structural discount.

source.locator: Aggregator book value ~$87.62/sh; last filed GAAP equity is FY2004 Exhibit 13 — stale

assumptions.label: OTC Pink and family-control realization discount on stated book

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Hanover Foods operating business
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

items.label: OTC / control illiquidity reserve
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: Scarce assets, royalties, and optionality
failure_modes: gross asset value mistaken for shareholder value
operating cash flow and NAV counted twice
remote options treated as contracted cash
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
